message:
feat(viewer): centralize backdrop-aware issue route builder, fix keyboard dependency nav, scope Escape/diagnostics polling

- Extract issueRouteFor() from navigateToIssue() so both imperative
  navigation and declarative href bindings (modal permalinks) use the
  same backdrop-aware route generation
- Fix keyboard h/l dependency navigation to use navigateToIssue() when
  the current route is an issue route, preserving URL-routed state
  instead of falling back to selectIssue() which loses the route
- Gate issue modal Escape handler on selectedIssue being truthy, and
  keyboard-help Escape on showKeyboardHelp being truthy, preventing
  both handlers from firing when their target panels are hidden
- Switch diagnostics WASM memory stats polling from unconditional
  setInterval to visibility-gated polling that starts/stops with the
  diagnostics panel via $watch('showDiagnostics')
- Replace window.addEventListener('resize') with Alpine @resize.window
  directive for graph detail panel mobile detection
- Add tests for backdrop route generation, keyboard dependency nav,
  Escape gating, and diagnostics polling lifecycle
- Sync beads issue tracker and history snapshots

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
